programme.title: Count Abdulla
programme.desc: Abdulla, desperate for some answers and unfaltering in his desire to find a cure to his vampirism, agrees to go on a date with Kathy at her favourite haunt. He can't shake the feeling that he is being watched.

programme.title: Dark Side of the Ring
programme.sub-title: Blood, Fire And The Original Sheik
programme.desc: One of the most hated heels in wrestling history; The Sheik, whose violent career spanned 50 years is revealed by his family and the few who survived his hardcore bloodbaths.

programme.title: NHK World English News
programme.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.

programme.title: Al Jazeera News Hour
programme.desc: In-depth global news from Al Jazeera Satellite Network, Doha, Qatar, in English.

programme.title: TRT World News
programme.desc: The latest news from around the globe from TRT World, Istanbul, Turkiye, in English.

programme.title: Te Ao with Moana
programme.desc: A weekly current affairs show that examines New Zealand and international stories through a Maori lens.

programme.title: FBC News
programme.desc: Local, world, sport and entertainment news in English from FBC News, Suva Fiji.

programme.title: France 24 Feature
programme.desc: News feature in English from France 24, Paris.

programme.title: euronews
programme.desc: Headlines, Breaking News & Analysis from the Euronews news centre in Brussels, Belgium, in English.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.

programme.title: CBC The National
programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang from Toronto, Canada. Watch on SBS VICELAND at 08:40am everyday, also available on SBS OnDemand.

programme.title: BBC 6 O'Clock News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 English News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: The Ring
programme.desc: The Ring is Euronews' weekly political debate. In each episode, two political representatives from across the EU propose a diversity of opinions and conversations around the most important issues of EU affairs and the wider European political life.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Film review with David Stratton and Margaret Pomeranz. Covers Scent of a Woman, Indecent Woman, Of Mice and Men, The Custodian with interviews of John Dingwall, Anthony La Paglia & Hugo Weaving.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Film review with David Stratton and Margaret Pomeranz. Covers Alive with Frank Marshall, Bob Roberts with Tim Robbins, and The Living End with Gregg Araki interviews.

programme.title: DW The Day
programme.desc: DW The Day is a news show that helps you understand emerging stories from Europe, the US and across the globe, in English, no subtitles.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: A sudden shift in weather tests the strength of the survivalists' shelters as well as their resolve. Unable to exit their shelters, one survivalist carves out creative ways to pass the time while another struggles to cope.

programme.title: UFOs: Investigating the Unknown
programme.desc: More pilots are reporting seeing UAPs in flight.

programme.title: Insight
programme.desc: More than 1.2 million Australians share the profound grief of losing their significant other. On this episode guests share how widowhood defines them, and we hear from those who've found love after loss, including a man whose dying wife set up his online dating profile.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 International News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: PBS NewsHour
programme.desc: Reviews and analysis of the day's news presented by Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett for the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS) in the United States.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: As stunning events unfold around the team's dig operation in the Money Pit area, they make a potentially historic discovery in the swamp.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts a brand-new episode of 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown. Meanwhile, maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers.

programme.title: American Godfathers: The Five Families
programme.desc: Episode 2 centres on a deadly clash between the old guard and younger American-born mobsters, who defy bosses and rules to pursue power, wealth and revenge.

programme.title: UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: For over 100,000 years, humans have found ways to lay the dead to rest. Graves, tombs, cremations are all considered respectful ways to provide the deceased with a final resting place. But is it possible that some of these practices can preserve the soul for eternity? Or even bring the dead back to life?

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: Farmer Jim is forced on a bumpy trip down memory lane when an old flame pops up in Hawley. The gang come up with an elaborate scheme to clear JJ's name.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: Tommo helps his new friend, literally, get his groove back. Vinnie and the gang rescue Gideon from the clutch of a naked cult.

programme.title: Dark Side of the 2000s
programme.desc: Men's magazines like Maxim inject new energy into the magazine industry, but they leave a toxic legacy in their wake.

programme.title: Dark Side of the 2000s
programme.sub-title: Siegfried and Roy: Magic and Mayhem
programme.desc: Siegfried and Roy transform Vegas, only to have their careers end in tragedy. But the truth of the 2003 tiger attack that nearly takes Roy's life is anything but straightforward.

programme.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.

programme.desc: In-depth global news from Al Jazeera Satellite Network, Doha, Qatar, in English.

programme.desc: News and analysis of the top international and European news and current affairs from Berlin, in English.

programme.desc: Local, world, sport and entertainment news in English from FBC News, Suva Fiji.

programme.desc: News feature in English from France 24, Paris.

programme.desc: Headlines, Breaking News & Analysis from the Euronews news centre in Brussels, Belgium, in English.

programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang from Toronto, Canada. Watch on SBS VICELAND at 08:40am everyday, also available on SBS OnDemand.

programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 English News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: A review program hosted by Margaret Pomeranz and David Stratton featuring reviews and interviews from the movie world.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: A review program hosted by Margaret Pomeranz and David Stratton featuring reviews and interviews from the movie world.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Film review with Margaret Pomeranz and David Stratton, covering Groundhog Day, Jennifer 8, Drive-In Story, One Full Moon, Delusion, and Map of the Human Heart.

programme.title: DW The Day
programme.desc: DW The Day is a news show that helps you understand emerging stories from Europe, the US and across the globe, in English, no subtitles.

programme.title: Land of the Giants: Titans of Tech
programme.desc: Apple's products have rewired our brains and remade society. This is the story of how Steve Jobs took the company to new heights and died with the status of 'icon'.

programme.title: The Cook Up with Adam Liaw Bitesize
programme.desc: Join host Adam Liaw and all your favourite chefs, cooks and celebrities for the best bits from The Cook Up kitchen.

programme.title: Bamay
programme.sub-title: Barkinji - Ngyiampaa - Mutthi Mutthi Country - Mungo NSW
programme.desc: Slow TV is back, celebrating stunning landscapes of Countries across Australia. Sit back and relax with the healing powers of Country.

programme.title: Where Are You Really From?
programme.desc: Michael visits the 100-year-old Greek community in Darwin, a group wiped out by economic ruin and devastating natural disasters in their home towns. He looks at how they rebuilt and became stronger in a new city that soon formed a part of their identity.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: PBS NewsHour
programme.desc: Reviews and analysis of the day's news presented by Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett for the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS) in the United States.

programme.title: Inside the Huddle
programme.desc: What is it like to be a footballer? Candid conversations, laughs, and insights that go beyond the game and into the outer.

programme.title: Over the Black Dot
programme.desc: In 2026, Over the Black Dot becomes a digital-first Rugby League yarn free-flowing conversations on footy, culture and community, with panellists and guests sharing authentic Indigenous stories.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: Travel Man
programme.desc: Richard takes actress and writer Jessica Hynes on a whirlwind weekend away to Iceland.

programme.title: Eschborn-Frankfurt
programme.desc: The 2026 Eschborn-Frankfurt is Germany's biggest one-day cycling race. Covering 210km with 3,300m of climbing, it promises the toughest challenge yet on the UCI World Tour.

programme.title: United Gangs of America
programme.desc: Soldiers of Aryan Culture feed off of the prison system that helps them spread hate and keeps their drug business booming.

programme.title: NHK World English News
programme.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.
